title: WinMerge VS Code Configuration
description: Configuration file for the WinMerge VS Code extension

$schema.description: Path to the JSON schema file for validation

defaultFilters.description: List of absolute paths to WinMerge .flt filter files to apply by default

encodingOverrides.description: Map of file extensions to encoding names (e.g. ".pas": "windows-1252")

gridDefaults.description: Default visibility settings for comparison result statuses in the grid

showEncodingOnly.description: Show files that differ only in encoding

showLeftOnly.description: Show files that exist only on the left side

showRightOnly.description: Show files that exist only on the right side
